blockers.title: Export trained full PushT ONNX artifacts
required_resolution: Produce and upload a PushT checkpoint with the exact 255-tensor Burn/Jepa safetensors layout expected by python/export_onnx.py, or formally change the release acceptance criteria.
Export both onnxruntime and tract-compat variants under onnx-full/.
Verify the exported graphs with python/verify_onnx.py.
Upload the verified variants to abdelstark/lewm-rs-pusht.

blockers.title: Run PushT CEM planning success-rate evaluation
required_resolution: Run 50 scored PushT CEM evaluation episodes against the F1 full-training ONNX artifacts.
Document success rate, p50/p95 latency, and per-episode results in reports/pusht_eval.md.
Record whether the success rate reaches the 87 percent target or document the deviation with root-cause analysis.
Use the measured results to unblock F4 and F7.

blockers.title: Launch SO-100 warm-start ablation
required_resolution: Provide a compatible PushT .mpk source checkpoint for LEWM_PUSHT_WARMSTART_MPK.
Update the agent safety leash so train_so100_warmstart.yaml is listed under jobs_human_approval_required.
Obtain explicit human approval for the paid HF Job launch.
Upload the resulting SO-100 warm-start artifacts and compute the warm-start delta.

blockers.title: Finalize PushT model card with CEM metrics
required_resolution: Update the live abdelstark/lewm-rs-pusht model card with training metrics, CEM success rate, p50/p95 latency, ONNX artifact links, reproduce commands, and citations.
Update CHANGELOG.md for the finalized PushT model card.
Cross-link the finalized card from README.md and paper/lewm-rs.md.

blockers.title: Finalize SO-100 model card with warm-start delta
required_resolution: Update the live abdelstark/lewm-rs-so100 model card with from-scratch vs warm-start training comparison.
Document the Spearman correlation delta and warm-start loss delta.
Update CHANGELOG.md and cross-link the finalized card from README.md and paper/lewm-rs.md.

blockers.title: Verify demo Space end-to-end
required_resolution: Verify https://huggingface.co/spaces/abdelstark/lewm-rs-demo is green with no build errors.
Run one CEM planning demo episode end-to-end and confirm the visualization renders.
Point the Space at the F1 full-training ONNX artifacts after they exist.
Update the Space description with the F2 success-rate result.

blockers.title: Complete paper section 6.2 CEM eval results
required_resolution: Replace the paper section 6.2 TBD with measured PushT success rate and CEM latency from reports/pusht_eval.md.
Generate and commit paper/figures/pusht_eval.pdf.
Verify the paper or docsite build succeeds without errors.

blockers.title: Complete paper section 7.3 SO-100 warm-start results
required_resolution: Replace the paper section 7.3 TBD with measured warm-start Spearman delta and training comparison.
Generate and commit paper/figures/so100_warmstart.pdf.
Verify the paper or docsite build succeeds without errors.

blockers.title: Publish HF Hub blog post
required_resolution: Publish the HF Hub blog post and record the live URL.
Cross-link the post from README.md, model cards, and the demo Space.
Update CHANGELOG.md with the blog link.

blockers.title: Prepare and submit paper to arXiv
required_resolution: Render the final PDF after F7 and F8 remove all TBD result sections.
Submit the paper to arXiv and record the submission/arXiv identifier.
Update README.md, CITATION.cff, and CHANGELOG.md with the arXiv link.

blockers.title: Fix GHCR package permissions
required_resolution: Grant AbdelStark/lewm-rs Write access to the ghcr.io/abdelstark/lewm-rs package settings.
Trigger release.yml and verify the container job passes.
Verify the latest GHCR image is published and signed.

blockers.title: Rotate HF_TOKEN before public release
required_resolution: Revoke the old Hugging Face token and create a fine-grained replacement with minimal required scopes.
Update the GitHub Actions HF_TOKEN secret.
Verify CI passes with the rotated token and log the rotation in reports/cost.md.

blockers.title: Tag and publish v1.0.0 release
required_resolution: Resolve F1 through F12 and complete reports/release_checklist.md.
Run CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 make accept on main.
Move CHANGELOG.md Unreleased content to a dated 1.0.0 release section.
Create and push the signed v1.0.0 tag, then verify release.yml and the GitHub Release artifacts pass.
